Figure 4. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons on the AWMM dataset.

Figure 2. Architecture of the proposed SEGD framework. SEGD integrates degradation perception, residual restoration, and orderadaptive aggregation in a unified design. DENet estimates degradation type and intensity priors, DRMs conduct degradation-specific residual restoration, and SE-ROS adaptively selects the optimal restoration orders via 2D SE minimization.
